Hello friends and welcome to application funnel amplifiers. So this is an added mini course to complement CTC enrollment, which is the main training we have on sales calls. This is really covering the ground that happens before the call. So we're going to talk about that in a second. But first, you will get the most out of this training if, well, obviously enrollment calls are part of your business currently, or something you plan on doing, right? So enrollment calls, sales calls, applications are something that are part of your business. And you want a sense of easefulness and momentum heading into them. So you don't get on a zoom call with somebody who applied and just kind of have zero relationship with them, zero comfort or confidence in your ability to coach them towards a decision. This is meant to replace that and it's actually meant to preempt a lot of the potential confidence killers, for lack of a better word, that might happen around getting on a call, one of the bigger ones being your fear that you're going to have to sell to them when they're not expecting to be sold to you or drop a price that is going to be fearful to them. So there's a lot of things we could do in the application flow itself to essentially set the stage in a way that gives us the confidence to get on that call with them. So you're also obviously going to get the most out of this if you're involved using testing, learning, adopting the CTC enrollment process in that course specifically. So if you've gone through that already amazing, if not, no problem, but you will get the most out of this if you plan to at least adopt that as well, as well as other practices, methods, strategies from either automated intimacy or CTC Platinum, which is the whole suite of copy training we have. So we do build upon concepts that have been touched upon in these programs. That said, if this is your first experience with us, this should operate pretty well as a standalone as well. So what is the scope of application funnel amplifiers? This is essentially going to take you through the journey from when a pre customer or a lead or prospect clicks apply that could be either on a sales page for your program that they need to apply for it could be via link and social it could be from a Google Doc sales page, it could be from anything, anything that they are clicking apply and landing on that application form. That's where this journey starts in a FA all the way up until the moment you finally meet them on a zoom call or on a phone call. So this is what it looks like in the context of everything else inside the CTC enrollment framework. As you can see, we have application funnel amplifiers at the beginning right here. This is the pre call experience, where you'll be coaching mastery, magnetism and momentum and that is going to be really the crux of everything we're orienting around in this training how to actually coach through those milestones right before that call actually starts. And then everything in that in between is the call itself, which is covered in CTC enrollment. And then we have post call, right, anything to do with follow ups, anything to do with pipelines, anything to do, essentially withholding someone ethically accountable to a decision that is covered in the Tyler Durden follow up, which is covered in length inside of automated intimacy. But for the purposes of this training, we are focusing right here at the beginning, the thing that sets the stage for all this other stuff to occur within the enrollment process. And it's important to know that the call experience itself really truly begins before the call even begins. And we're not just talking about that in some energetic or spiritual sense, but actually quite practically because the questions you ask on your application and receive answers on can actually be amazingly useful starting points for the conversation so that you're not jumping on and asking how the weather is and if the fall if the fall leaves have turned color yet, you're actually jumping off on a very relevant point based on a question you asked in your application. Likewise, if you are giving some degree of awareness or transparency on the price or the price range of your program, then that will preempt their concerns and anxiety and garden this around being on that call almost not wanting to like it not wanting to love it because of their fear that they won't be able to afford it, right? So having that knowledge up front, which is something you could do in the pre call experience and application funnel amplifiers will both make them feel more safe about getting on the call more open and receptive to the transformation that you're coaching. And it will give you more confidence knowing that a the person who is joining you on the call is fully aware and knowledgeable that this is going to be a call exploring their fit into a certain program and that they already know the price range and they have chosen and consented to be on that call. Anyway, so these are some tremendously useful starting off points. And likewise, your coaching relationship begins here. We've spoken about the observer effect before and past trainings, but for simplicity purposes, right? Treat this as a coaching relationship or a coaching experience, not a sales experience, presume that the sale has already happened and treat this window between application or between landing on the application and the call itself as essentially onboarding into your program, right? What questions would you want to be asking? What information would you want to glean to ensure customer success? And how would you respond to them? What actions would you take towards your preclined if you knew that they would end up being a customer? How would that change the way you related to them? How would that change the way you sought to give value to them and make them feel safe, experienced and valued? So these are the frames we will be using. This is how it's going to break down. So in the next lesson, lesson one, we are going to go over the source code of a f a meaning what is magnetism, what is momentum and what is mastery and how are we going to go about coaching those milestones before someone gets on the call with us. So we're going to unpack that a little bit more. And then we're going to go over the specific assets that make this application funnel work. So we're going to talk about your application questions, how to structure them, what tools we personally use for creating it. Then we're going to talk about your confirmation page, which isn't just a throwaway thing you patched together from some lead pages or click funnels template, but a very deliberate page that's coaching some pretty specific, unique and important aspects of the conversion experience. And then, of course, mastering your pre call onboarding, right? What is happening in that sacred in between, between someone applying booking a time and you actually getting on the call, right? So this is a gap of time that needs to be met with some degree of proper onboarding. So we are going to go over all three of those critical touch points, assets at length, give you both the copy strategies, the overall strategies, and Phil Powis is going to jump in with some incredibly useful technical implication, technical implementation tips, tools, strategies, walkthroughs, so that you really have everything you need to put all these pieces within your application funnel into play. So that's it for now. Take a breather. And when you're ready, meet me in the next lesson where we will go over the source code of application funnel amplifiers. I'll see you then.
